data.name: Section_Contact
data.comment: Section header above contact rows in the Compact layout.

data.name: Section_Details
data.comment: Section header above grid fields in the Compact layout.

data.name: Section_Info
data.comment: Section header above detail fields in the Compact layout.

data.name: Action_Call
data.comment: aria-label / title for tappable phone link. {0} is the phone number.

data.name: Action_Email
data.comment: aria-label / title for tappable email link. {0} is the email address.

data.name: Action_OpenInMaps
data.comment: aria-label / title for tappable map link. {0} is the address.

data.name: Action_OpenWebsite
data.comment: aria-label / title for tappable website link. {0} is the URL.

data.name: Action_OpenRecord
data.comment: aria-label for clickable lookup title/subtitle. {0} is the record name.

data.name: Card_Expand
data.comment: aria-label when the Smart Card is collapsed and can be expanded.

data.name: Card_Collapse
data.comment: aria-label when the Smart Card is expanded and can be collapsed.

data.name: Duration_Days_Suffix
data.comment: Suffix appended after the day count in formatted durations (e.g. "3d").

data.name: Duration_Hours_Suffix
data.comment: Suffix appended after the hour count in formatted durations (e.g. "5h").

data.name: Duration_Minutes_Suffix
data.comment: Suffix appended after the minute count in formatted durations (e.g. "22m").

data.name: Duration_Zero
data.comment: Rendered text when a duration is zero minutes.

data.name: Action_Copy
data.comment: aria-label / tooltip for the copy-to-clipboard button next to phone/email/address chips. {0} is the value being copied.

data.name: Action_Copied
data.comment: Live-region announcement after a successful copy-to-clipboard.
